adUnitId.description: The ad unit ID provided by Insticator

publisherId.description: The publisher ID provided by Insticator

instl.description: 1 = the ad is interstitial or full screen, 0 = not interstitial.

pos.description: ad position as per IAB standards

bid_endpoint_request_url.description: Url string representing the endpoint Insticator adaptor should make the request bids to.

bidfloorcur.description: Currency of the floor. (Insticator only supports USD floors)
